description_long: This is a polygonal bottle with a tall, faceted body and a short, wide neck topped by a matching cap. The bottle's surface is predominantly a mottled green with a broad, off-white horizontal label area encircling the midsection, bordered by green bands. The cap is similarly colored, with alternating green and off-white bands, and appears to be integrated or tightly fitted. The bottle has a geometric, almost octagonal cross-section, giving it a distinctive, angular appearance. The surface texture appears slightly rough and matte, suggesting it may be made of ceramic or aged glass. There are no visible logos, text, or branding elements on the label area.
description: A faceted, green and off-white bottle with a wide neck and matching cap, featuring a broad blank label area and a slightly rough, matte surface.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from an angle, showing its faceted body, the broad off-white label bordered by green, and the cap's banded design.
description_view_1: This view shows the bottle's widest face, highlighting the full expanse of the off-white label and the symmetry of the cap and neck.
description_view_2: The bottle is rotated to display another angled side, with the green and off-white color scheme and the faceted geometry clearly visible.
description_view_3: A direct view of the opposite wide face, mirroring view 1, with the label and cap bands prominent.
